title: ElectionDecidedPayload
description: The clock closed the vote and a mayor is seated (a governments row; the incumbent, if any, is dissolved). Root event: the scheduled clock has no envelope parent (causationId null, M1-9 job-run precedent). voteCounts is keyed by candidate VILLAGER id — the ids every consumer already knows. The 03-events sketch's 'turnout' is deliberately absent: government-service cannot honestly know the electorate size (that denominator lives with the villager roster); totalVotes ships instead. Producer: government-service on government.events, aggregate = the Election.

voteCounts.description: candidateVillagerId -> votes received. Candidates with zero votes appear with 0.
